faq.question: Luggage room
faq.answer: You can leave your luggage securely in our luggage room at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_en: You can leave your luggage securely in our luggage room at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_ru: Вы можете безопасно оставить багаж в камере хранения в Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_cs: Zavazadla muzete bezpecne ulozit v ulozne zavazadel ve Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).

faq.question: Check-in time
faq.answer: Check-in starts at 14:00. If you arrive earlier, you can leave your luggage at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_en: Check-in starts at 14:00. If you arrive earlier, you can leave your luggage at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_ru: Заезд начинается с 14:00. Если вы приезжаете раньше, можно оставить багаж в Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_cs: Check-in zacina ve 14:00. Pokud prijedete drive, muzete nechat zavazadla ve Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).

faq.question: Check-out time
faq.answer: Check-out is until 11:00. After check-out, you can leave your luggage securely at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_en: Check-out is until 11:00. After check-out, you can leave your luggage securely at Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_ru: Выезд до 11:00. После выезда можно безопасно оставить багаж в Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).
faq.answer_cs: Check-out je do 11:00. Po odjezdu muzete bezpecne ulozit zavazadla ve Villa Wagner (Jecna 39).

faq.question: Airport transfer
faq.answer: We can arrange airport transfer. Price: 35 EUR per car one way (3-4 people) or 51 EUR for minivan (up to 8 people). Round-trip: 58 EUR per car or 87 EUR for minivan. To book, email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz with your flight number and arrival/pick-up time.
faq.answer_en: We can arrange airport transfer. Price: 35 EUR per car one way (3-4 people) or 51 EUR for minivan (up to 8 people). Round-trip: 58 EUR per car or 87 EUR for minivan. To book, email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz with your flight number and arrival/pick-up time.
faq.answer_ru: Мы можем организовать трансфер из/в аэропорт. Цена: 35 EUR за машину в одну сторону (3-4 человека) или 51 EUR за минивэн (до 8 человек). Туда-обратно: 58 EUR за машину или 87 EUR за минивэн. Для брони напишите на front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz номер рейса и время прилета/выезда.
faq.answer_cs: Muzeme zaridit transfer z/na letiste. Cena: 35 EUR za auto jednim smerem (3-4 osoby) nebo 51 EUR za minivan (do 8 osob). Zpetna cesta: 58 EUR za auto nebo 87 EUR za minivan. Pro rezervaci napiste na front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz cislo letu a cas prijezdu/vyzvednuti.

faq.question: How to check in
faq.answer: You can complete check-in independently via the self check-in kiosk inside the building. Use code 3621# at the main entrance, then use the kiosk on the left side. You need your booking number and a valid passport or EU citizen ID card.
faq.answer_en: You can complete check-in independently via the self check-in kiosk inside the building. Use code 3621# at the main entrance, then use the kiosk on the left side. You need your booking number and a valid passport or EU citizen ID card.
faq.answer_ru: Вы можете пройти самостоятельный заезд через киоск self check-in внутри здания. Для входа используйте код 3621# на главной двери, затем слева будет киоск. Нужны номер брони и действующий паспорт или ID-карта гражданина ЕС.
faq.answer_cs: Check-in muzete provest samostatne pres self check-in kiosk uvnitr budovy. Pro vstup pouzijte kod 3621# na hlavnich dverich, kiosk je vlevo. Potrebujete cislo rezervace a platny pas nebo obcansky prukaz EU.

faq.question: What is booking number
faq.answer: Booking number is the number you receive after making a reservation.
faq.answer_en: Booking number is the number you receive after making a reservation.
faq.answer_ru: Номер брони — это номер, который вы получаете после оформления бронирования.
faq.answer_cs: Cislo rezervace je cislo, ktere obdrzite po provedeni rezervace.

faq.question: Booking number is not working
faq.answer: Please contact the portal where you made your reservation, or send your full name from the reservation and wait for reception response.
faq.answer_en: Please contact the portal where you made your reservation, or send your full name from the reservation and wait for reception response.
faq.answer_ru: Пожалуйста, свяжитесь с порталом, где вы сделали бронирование, или отправьте полное имя из брони и дождитесь ответа ресепшн.
faq.answer_cs: Kontaktujte prosim portal, kde jste rezervaci vytvorili, nebo poslete cele jmeno z rezervace a pockejte na odpoved recepce.

faq.question: Parking
faq.answer: Parking is available in neighboring buildings for around 20 EUR per night (depends on car size and availability). To reserve, email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz with car model and exact dimensions.
faq.answer_en: Parking is available in neighboring buildings for around 20 EUR per night (depends on car size and availability). To reserve, email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz with car model and exact dimensions.
faq.answer_ru: Парковка доступна в соседних зданиях примерно за 20 EUR за ночь (зависит от размера авто и наличия мест). Для брони отправьте на front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz модель и точные размеры автомобиля.
faq.answer_cs: Parkovani je k dispozici v sousednich budovach cca za 20 EUR za noc (zalezi na velikosti vozu a dostupnosti). Pro rezervaci poslete na front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz model auta a presne rozmery.

faq.question: SPA
faq.answer: We do not offer SPA services, but we can arrange Thai massage. Please email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_en: We do not offer SPA services, but we can arrange Thai massage. Please email front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_ru: Мы не предоставляем SPA-услуги, но можем организовать тайский массаж. Напишите на front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_cs: SPA sluzby nenabizime, ale muzeme zaridit thajskou masaz. Napisete prosim na front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.

faq.question: Breakfast
faq.answer: We recommend Coffee Factory. Hotel guests receive 10% discount on the full menu. Please inform cafe staff at payment that you are a guest.
faq.answer_en: We recommend Coffee Factory. Hotel guests receive 10% discount on the full menu. Please inform cafe staff at payment that you are a guest.
faq.answer_ru: Рекомендуем кофейню Coffee Factory. Гости отеля получают скидку 10% на все меню. При оплате сообщите, что вы гость отеля.
faq.answer_cs: Doporucujeme kavarnu Coffee Factory. Hoste hotelu maji 10% slevu na cele menu. Pri platbe informujte personal, ze jste host hotelu.

faq.question: Contact reception
faq.answer: For additional help, please write in this chat or contact front desk at front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_en: For additional help, please write in this chat or contact front desk at front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_ru: Для дополнительной помощи напишите в этот чат или свяжитесь с ресепшн: front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
faq.answer_cs: Pro dalsi pomoc napiste do tohoto chatu nebo kontaktujte recepci: front.desk@royalcourthotel.cz.
